detectors.description:
Rubixi (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#10-162) contract sets array length with a user-controlled value:
	- participants.push(Participant(msg.sender,(msg.value * pyramidMultiplier) / 100)) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#61)
detectors.markdown:
[Rubixi](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L10-L162) contract sets array length with a user-controlled value:
	- [participants.push(Participant(msg.sender,(msg.value * pyramidMultiplier) / 100))](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L61)

detectors.description:
Rubixi.collectPercentOfFees(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#99-105) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- feesToCollect = collectedFees / 100 * _pcent (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#102)
detectors.markdown:
[Rubixi.collectPercentOfFees(uint256)](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L99-L105) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- [feesToCollect = collectedFees / 100 * _pcent](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L102)

detectors.description: Rubixi.collectPercentOfFees(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#99-105) ignores return value by creator.send(feesToCollect) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#103)
Rubixi.collectFeesInEther(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#89-97) ignores return value by creator.send(_amt) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#95)
Rubixi.collectAllFees() (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#82-87) ignores return value by creator.send(collectedFees) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#85)
Rubixi.addPayout(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#59-79) ignores return value by participants[payoutOrder].etherAddress.send(payoutToSend) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#74)

Rubixi.changeOwner(address) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#108-110) should emit an event for: 
	- creator = _owner (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#109)

Rubixi.changeMultiplier(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#112-116) should emit an event for: 
	- pyramidMultiplier = _mult (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#115)

Rubixi.collectPercentOfFees(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#99-105) should emit an event for: 
	- collectedFees -= feesToCollect (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#104)

Rubixi.changeFeePercentage(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#118-122) should emit an event for: 
	- feePercent = _fee (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#121)

Rubixi.collectFeesInEther(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#89-97) should emit an event for: 
	- collectedFees -= _amt (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#96)

Rubixi.changeOwner(address)._owner (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#108) lacks a zero-check on :
		- creator = _owner (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#109)
Modifier Rubixi.onlyowner() (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#27-29) does not always execute _; or revert
detectors.markdown: Modifier [Rubixi.onlyowner()](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L27-L29) does not always execute _; or revert

detectors.description:
Rubixi.addPayout(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#59-79) has external calls inside a loop: participants[payoutOrder].etherAddress.send(payoutToSend) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#74)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Rubixi.fallback()
		Rubixi.init()
detectors.markdown:
[Rubixi.addPayout(uint256)](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L59-L79) has external calls inside a loop: [participants[payoutOrder].etherAddress.send(payoutToSend)](work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#L74)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Rubixi.fallback()
		Rubixi.init()

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.15 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.15 (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#8)

Reentrancy in Rubixi.collectFeesInEther(uint256) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#89-97):
	External calls:
	- collectAllFees() (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#91)
		- creator.send(collectedFees) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#85)
	- creator.send(_amt) (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#95)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- collectedFees -= _amt (work/flattened/Rubixi.sol#96)
